mapper.select: SELECT p.permission_code AS permission FROM MIS_USER u JOIN MIS_USER_ROLE ur ON u.id = ur.user_id JOIN MIS_ROLE_PERMISSION rp ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id JOIN MIS_PERMISSION p ON rp.permission_id = p.id WHERE u.id = #{userId}
SELECT id, username, password, name, sex, tel, email, dept_id as deptId, job, ref_id as refId, status, create_time as createTime FROM MIS_USER WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MIS_USER (id, username, password, name, sex, tel, email, dept_id, job, ref_id, status, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{sex}, #{tel}, #{email}, #{deptId}, #{job}, #{refId}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM MIS_USER WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT role_id FROM MIS_USER_ROLE WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM MIS_USER_ROLE WHERE user_id IN
#{userId}
